evals.name: price-discount-tests
evals.expected_output: Jest TS tests in src/utils/__tests__/price.spec.ts covering normal price, zero price and negative discount error, using AAA and correct imports.

assertions.name: creates-tests-in-__tests__
assertions.text: Creates or updates src/utils/__tests__/price.spec.ts for tests.

assertions.name: uses-aaa-structure
assertions.text: All tests for calculateDiscount use explicit Arrange/Act/Assert comments in the correct order.

assertions.name: covers-zero-price
assertions.text: There is at least one test that verifies behavior when price is 0.

assertions.name: covers-negative-discount-error
assertions.text: There is at least one test that asserts an error when discount is negative.

assertions.name: does-not-mock-unit-under-test
assertions.text: The calculateDiscount function or its module is not mocked or spied on.

evals.name: user-service-mocking
evals.expected_output: src/services/__tests__/userService.spec.ts updated with AAA Jest TS tests for getUserWithBalance: success, 404 not found and generic error, using mocked apiClient.

assertions.name: writes-tests-in-service-tests-dir
assertions.text: Creates or updates src/services/__tests__/userService.spec.ts.

assertions.name: mocks-api-client-module
assertions.text: Mocks the apiClient module (for example via jest.mock("../apiClient")).

assertions.name: has-success-test
assertions.text: Contains a test where getUserWithBalance returns user data successfully.

assertions.name: has-not-found-test
assertions.text: Contains a test for a 404 or 'user not found' response.

assertions.name: has-generic-error-test
assertions.text: Contains a test for a generic error from apiClient.get.

assertions.name: does-not-mock-getUserWithBalance
assertions.text: Does not mock or spy on getUserWithBalance itself; only external dependencies are mocked.

evals.name: normalize-phone-tests
evals.expected_output: Jest TS tests in src/helpers/__tests__/normalizePhone.spec.ts for normalizePhone: already normalized, spaces/dashes cleanup, invalid input throws; AAA and no duplicate scenarios.

assertions.name: creates-tests-in-helpers-__tests__
assertions.text: Creates or updates src/helpers/__tests__/normalizePhone.spec.ts.

assertions.name: tests-normalized-input
assertions.text: Has a test where input is already in normalized +7 format.

assertions.name: tests-spaces-and-dashes
assertions.text: Has a test that verifies spaces and dashes are removed from the phone string.

assertions.name: tests-invalid-input-error
assertions.text: Has a test that asserts an error is thrown for invalid input.

assertions.name: aaa-structure-used
assertions.text: Tests for normalizePhone follow AAA with explicit comments.

evals.name: extend-calculate-order-total-tests
evals.expected_output: src/orders/__tests__/calculateOrderTotal.spec.ts extended (not replaced) with AAA Jest TS tests for discount coupon and free shipping, preserving existing tests.

assertions.name: modifies-existing-test-file
assertions.text: Updates src/orders/__tests__/calculateOrderTotal.spec.ts rather than creating a new test file.

assertions.name: keeps-existing-tests
assertions.text: Existing tests in calculateOrderTotal.spec.ts remain present (not deleted or renamed arbitrarily).

assertions.name: adds-discount-test
assertions.text: Adds at least one test that covers orders with a discount coupon.

assertions.name: adds-free-shipping-test
assertions.text: Adds at least one test that covers orders that qualify for free shipping.

assertions.name: aaa-structure-new-tests
assertions.text: New tests added for discount and free shipping follow AAA with comments.

evals.name: react-non-ts-rejection
evals.expected_output: Assistant explains that unit-tests-ts-js handles only .ts/.js/.cjs/.mjs modules, not .tsx React components, so it does not generate tests and suggests a more appropriate approach or skill for React.

assertions.name: rejects-tsx
assertions.text: Recognizes .tsx extension and states that unit-tests-ts-js does not handle React components.

assertions.name: no-tests-generated-for-tsx
assertions.text: Does not create or modify any test files for src/components/Button.tsx.

evals.name: vue-non-ts-rejection
evals.expected_output: Assistant explains that unit-tests-ts-js handles only .ts/.js/.cjs/.mjs modules, not .vue Vue components, so it does not generate tests and suggests a more appropriate approach or skill for Vue.

assertions.name: rejects-vue
assertions.text: Recognizes .vue extension and states that unit-tests-ts-js does not handle Vue components.

assertions.name: no-tests-generated-for-vue
assertions.text: Does not create or modify any test files for src/components/Modal.vue.
